title: Whispering Smith
writer: Elliott J. Clawson, Will M. Ritchey, Frank H. Spearman
actors: H.B. Warner, Lillian Rich, John Bowers
plot: Railroad foreman Murray Sinclair is dismissed by George McCloud, division superintendent, for ransacking wrecks. Sinclair along with his henchmen, retire to his ranch and forays against the railroad. "Whispering Smith," engaged by...
